ddls:
CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the response */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable being measured */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison category */,
  "physical" REAL /* Score for the physical well-being category */,
  "emotional" REAL /* Score for the emotional well-being category */,
  "social" REAL /* Score for the social well-being category */,
  "school" REAL /* Score for the school well-being category */,
  "psychosocial" REAL /* Score for the psychosocial well-being category */,
  "total" REAL /* Total score for all categories */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was submitted */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prevention program */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or feedback from the participant */,
  "physical_activity_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of physical activity */,
  "physical_activity_type" TEXT /* Type of physical activity */,
  "mental_health_status" TEXT /* Mental health status */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status */,
  "health_condition_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of health condition IDs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES prevention_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the participant */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date the participant participated in the survey */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education of the participant */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "health_history" TEXT /* Significant health history of the participant */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Whether the participant has signed a consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "variable_group" TEXT /* Group to which the variable belongs */,
  "variable_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the variable for weighted scoring */,
  "variable_units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison category */,
  "comparison_name" TEXT /* Name of the comparison category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the comparison category */,
  "comparison_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score assigned to the comparison category */,
  "comparison_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the comparison category for weighted scoring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prevention_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prevention program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the prevention program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the prevention program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the program */,
  "program_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevention_programs_program_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the health condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the health condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_health_conditions" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id", "condition_id")
)
